notes: Spec-lock: two new modules -- risk_budget.py (three-tier max-loss cap with TOML config + JSONL state) and broker_health.py (30-s cache over Sprint 1's broker_connection.test_connection). No imports from agent/live, agent/risk, or agent/squad -- F012 is the Sprint 2 product-branch equivalent, not a wire-up. Live-mode-off gate #3.
invariants_pinned: risk_budget.can_send_order() is the ONLY public entry point that answers 'may this order proceed given today's realised losses'
Wins do NOT restore headroom (asymmetric cap by design)
Broker probe cached at 30 s -- reuses Sprint 1's test_connection under the hood
No file in agent/platform imports from agent/live, agent/risk, agent/squad (per Invariant #2)
Password never surfaces in broker_health return payload (whitelisted fields only)
acceptance: risk_budget module: load/save config, record_fill, remaining_budget, can_send_order
broker_health module: check_broker_health with cache, is_broker_alive, list_health_states
38 tests covering module + page + API + scenario
